1542.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he divorced his wife while she was menstruating, and Umar mentioned that to the Prophet ﷺ, who said: 'Tell him to take her back and keep her until she is pure, then has her period, then is pure again; then if he wishes he may keep her and if he wishes he may divorce her before touching her, for that is the prescribed waiting period as Allah has commanded for the divorce of women.'
1542.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menceraikan istrinya ketika sedang haid, dan Umar menyebutkan hal itu kepada Nabi ﷺ, lalu beliau bersabda: 'Perintahkan ia untuk merujuknya dan menahannya sampai ia suci, lalu haid, lalu suci kembali; maka jika ia mau ia bisa menahannya, dan jika ia mau ia bisa menceraikannya sebelum menyentuhnya, karena itulah masa idah yang Allah perintahkan untuk menceraikan wanita.'

1543.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that when Ibn Umar divorced his wife, Umar said to the Prophet ﷺ, and he said: 'Tell him to take her back, then divorce her when she is pure.'
1543.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika Ibn Umar menceraikan istrinya, Umar menyampaikan hal itu kepada Nabi ﷺ, lalu beliau bersabda: 'Perintahkan ia untuk merujuknya, kemudian menceraikannya ketika ia suci.'

1544.iwh_en: Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ divorced Hafsah, then took her back.'
1544.iwh_id: Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menceraikan Hafsah, kemudian merujuknya kembali.'

1545.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ divorced Hafsah, then took her back.
1545.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menceraikan Hafsah, kemudian merujuknya kembali.

1546.iwh_en: It was narrated from the family of Ibn Hazm that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wrote to the people of Yemen that a menstruating woman should not be touched until she has been purified.
1546.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari keluarga Ibn Hazm bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menulis surat kepada penduduk Yaman bahwa wanita yang sedang haid tidak boleh disentuh hingga ia suci.

1547.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The wife of Rifa'ah al-Qurazi came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while Abu Bakr was present, and said: "O Messenger of Allah, Rifa'ah divorced me with a final divorce, and Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Zubayr al-Qurazi married me, and he is like the fringe of a garment." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ smiled and said: "Do you want to go back to Rifa'ah? That cannot be until you taste his honey and he tastes yours."'
1547.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Istri Rifa'ah al-Qurazhi datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ saat Abu Bakr hadir, dan berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, Rifa'ah telah menceraikanku dengan talak tiga, dan Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Zubayr al-Qurazhi menikahinya, namun ia bagaikan ujung kain (tidak memberikan kepuasan)." Rasulullah ﷺ tersenyum dan bersabda: "Apakah kamu ingin kembali kepada Rifa'ah? Itu tidak bisa sampai kamu merasakan madunya dan ia merasakan madumu."'

1548.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Rifa'ah divorced a woman from Banu Qurayza and Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Zubayr married her. She came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: "O Messenger of Allah, by Allah, all he has is like the fringe of a garment." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Do you want to return to Rifa'ah? No, not until he tastes your honey and you taste his."'
1548.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rifa'ah menceraikan seorang wanita dari Banu Qurayza dan Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Zubayr menikahinya. Ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, demi Allah, yang ia miliki hanyalah seperti ujung kain." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Apakah kamu ingin kembali kepada Rifa'ah? Tidak, sampai ia merasakan madumu dan kamu merasakan madunya."'

1549.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave us a choice, and we chose him, so it was not considered a divorce.'
1549.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberi kami pilihan, dan kami memilih beliau, maka itu tidak dihitung sebagai talak.'

1550.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Any woman who asks her husband for a divorce without hardship, the fragrance of Paradise is forbidden to her.'
1550.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wanita mana saja yang meminta cerai dari suaminya tanpa alasan yang kuat, maka harum surga diharamkan atasnya.'

1551.iwh_en: It was narrated from Habibah bint Sahl al-Ansariyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that Thabit ibn Qays ibn Shammas married her, and she mentioned that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had intended to marry her but she was his neighbor, and that Thabit had struck her. She came and stood at the door of the Prophet ﷺ at dawn and said: 'Thabit ibn Qays is no longer a husband for me.' The Prophet ﷺ asked: 'Will you return his garden?' She said: 'Yes.' So he returned the garden and the Prophet ﷺ separated them.
1551.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Habibah binti Sahl al-Anshariyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Thabit ibn Qays ibn Shammas menikahinya, dan ia menyebutkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pernah berniat menikahinya dan ia adalah tetangganya, serta Thabit pernah memukulnya. Ia datang dan berdiri di pintu Nabi ﷺ saat fajar dan berkata: 'Thabit ibn Qays tidak lagi menjadi suamiku.' Nabi ﷺ bertanya: 'Apakah kamu akan mengembalikan kebunnya?' Ia menjawab: 'Ya.' Maka ia mengembalikan kebun itu dan Nabi ﷺ memisahkan mereka.

1552.iwh_en: It was narrated from the family of Rukanah that Rukanah divorced his wife with a final (triple) divorce in one sitting, and then felt extreme grief over it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked him: 'How did you divorce her?' He said: 'With a final divorce.' He said: 'With one word (utterance)?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'That counts as one, so take her back if you wish.'
1552.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari keluarga Rukanah bahwa Rukanah menceraikan istrinya dengan talak al-battah (tiga kali) dalam satu kali duduk, lalu ia sangat menyesalinya. Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya kepadanya: 'Bagaimana kamu menceraikannya?' Ia menjawab: 'Dengan talak al-battah.' Beliau bertanya: 'Dalam satu ucapan?' Ia menjawab: 'Ya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu hanya terhitung satu, maka rujuklah jika kamu mau.'

1553.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salamah ibn Sakhr al-Bayadi (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was a man who was given more than others to relations with women, so when Ramadan came, I feared I might do something at night, and it would continue, so I made zihar with my wife until Ramadan ended. Then one night I came to her and she revealed herself to me, so I had relations with her. I went to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and told him. He said: "Free a slave." I said: "I have nothing." He said: "Then fast two consecutive months." I said: "That is what afflicted me." He said: "Then feed sixty poor persons."'
1553.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salamah ibn Sakhr al-Bayadi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku adalah seorang laki-laki yang sangat berhasrat kepada wanita. Ketika bulan Ramadan tiba, aku khawatir melakukan sesuatu di malam hari dan terus berlanjut, maka aku melakukan zihar terhadap istriku hingga Ramadan berakhir. Kemudian suatu malam aku mendatanginya dan ia menyingkapkan dirinya kepadaku, sehingga aku menggaulinya. Aku pergi kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan memberitahukannya. Beliau bersabda: "Bebaskanlah seorang budak." Aku berkata: "Aku tidak memiliki apa-apa." Beliau bersabda: "Maka berpuasalah dua bulan berturut-turut." Aku berkata: "Itulah yang menimpaku." Beliau bersabda: "Maka berilah makan enam puluh orang miskin."'

1554.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatimah bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that her husband divorced her with a triple divorce and the Prophet ﷺ did not assign her any maintenance or accommodation.
1554.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa suaminya menceraikannya dengan talak tiga dan Nabi ﷺ tidak menetapkan nafkah maupun tempat tinggal baginya.

1555.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fatimah bint Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that her husband divorced her with a triple divorce, and the Prophet ﷺ commanded her to observe her waiting period at the home of her cousin Ibn Umm Maktum.
1555.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fatimah binti Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa suaminya menceraikannya dengan talak tiga, dan Nabi ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk menjalani masa idah di rumah saudara sepupunya, Ibn Umm Maktum.

1556.iwh_en: Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'We will not abandon the Book of our Lord and the Sunnah of our Prophet because of the words of a woman: a woman who has been divorced three times is entitled to accommodation and maintenance.'
1556.iwh_id: Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Kami tidak akan meninggalkan Kitab Tuhan kami dan Sunnah Nabi kami karena ucapan seorang wanita: wanita yang diceraikan tiga kali berhak mendapatkan tempat tinggal dan nafkah.'

1557.iwh_en: Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'We will not accept the word of a woman in the religion of Allah: a woman who has been given three divorces is entitled to accommodation and maintenance.'
1557.iwh_id: Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Kami tidak akan menerima perkataan seorang wanita dalam agama Allah: wanita yang telah diceraikan tiga kali berhak mendapatkan tempat tinggal dan nafkah.'

1558.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Salamah ibn Abd al-Rahman that he gathered with Ibn Abbas and Abu Hurairah and they discussed the case of a man who dies leaving his wife pregnant, and she gives birth a few nights later. Ibn Abbas said: 'Her idah ends with the later of the two periods.' Abu Salamah said: 'When she gave birth, she became free to remarry, so the waiting period ended.'
1558.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Salamah ibn Abd al-Rahman bahwa ia berkumpul bersama Ibn Abbas dan Abu Hurairah dan mereka membahas kasus seorang laki-laki yang meninggal meninggalkan istrinya dalam keadaan hamil, lalu ia melahirkan beberapa malam kemudian. Ibn Abbas berkata: 'Idahnya berakhir dengan yang lebih lama dari dua masa.' Abu Salamah berkata: 'Ketika ia melahirkan, ia bebas untuk menikah kembali, maka masa idah berakhir.'

1559.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The husband of Subay'ah bint al-Harith died, and she gave birth a few days after her husband's death, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded her to remarry.'
1559.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Suami Subay'ah binti al-Harits meninggal dunia, lalu ia melahirkan beberapa hari setelah kematian suaminya, dan Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk menikah kembali.'

1560.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Sanabil (may Allah be pleased with him) that Subay'ah bint al-Harith gave birth more than twenty nights after her husband's death, and when she recovered from her postpartum state she adorned herself. This was criticized. Her case was mentioned to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he confirmed that she was permitted to remarry.
1560.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Sanabil (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Subay'ah binti al-Harits melahirkan lebih dari dua puluh malam setelah kematian suaminya, dan ketika ia pulih dari nifasnya ia berhias. Hal ini dikritik. Kasusnya disebutkan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau membenarkan bahwa ia diizinkan untuk menikah kembali.

1561.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Aswad that Subay'ah gave birth a few days after her husband's death and adorned herself. Abu al-Sanabil criticized that. She asked or mentioned her case to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he commanded her to remarry.
1561.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Aswad bahwa Subay'ah melahirkan beberapa hari setelah kematian suaminya dan berhias. Abu al-Sanabil mengkritik hal itu. Ia bertanya atau menyebutkan kasusnya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau memerintahkannya untuk menikah kembali.

1562.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'It is not permissible for a woman who believes in Allah and the Last Day to mourn for anyone for more than three days, except for her husband, for whom she mourns for four months and ten days.'
1562.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak halal bagi seorang wanita yang beriman kepada Allah dan hari akhir untuk berkabung atas siapa pun lebih dari tiga hari, kecuali untuk suaminya, di mana ia berkabung selama empat bulan sepuluh hari.'

1563.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habibah bint Abi Sufyan (may Allah be pleased with her) that a brother of hers or a relative died, and she applied a yellowish perfume, saying: 'I do this only because the Prophet ﷺ said: "It is not permissible for a woman who believes in Allah and the Last Day to mourn for more than three days, except for her husband, for whom she mourns for four months and ten days."'
1563.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah binti Abi Sufyan (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa saudara atau kerabatnya meninggal, dan ia menggunakan parfum berwarna kuning sambil berkata: 'Aku melakukan ini hanya karena Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak halal bagi seorang wanita yang beriman kepada Allah dan hari akhir untuk berkabung lebih dari tiga hari, kecuali untuk suaminya, di mana ia berkabung selama empat bulan sepuluh hari."'

1564.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'A woman shall not mourn for more than three days except for a husband, for whom she mourns for four months and ten days. She shall not wear dyed garments except striped cloth (asb), nor apply kohl, nor perfume, except when she is pure and uses a little qust or azfar.'
1564.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang wanita tidak boleh berkabung lebih dari tiga hari kecuali untuk suaminya, di mana ia berkabung selama empat bulan sepuluh hari. Ia tidak boleh memakai pakaian yang dicelup kecuali kain asb (bergaris-garis), tidak boleh memakai celak mata, dan tidak boleh memakai parfum, kecuali ketika ia suci menggunakan sedikit qust atau azfar.'

1565.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Furai'ah bint Malik (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for permission to return to her family after her husband was killed. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ initially permitted her, then called her back and said: 'Remain in your home until the prescribed term expires.'
1565.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Furai'ah binti Malik (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia meminta izin kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk kembali ke keluarganya setelah suaminya terbunuh. Rasulullah ﷺ awalnya mengizinkannya, kemudian memanggilnya kembali dan bersabda: 'Tetaplah di rumahmu hingga masa yang ditentukan habis.'

1566.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that his maternal aunt was divorced and she wanted to harvest her date palms. A man told her she could not go out. She came to the Prophet ﷺ and mentioned that. He said: 'Go out and harvest your date palms, perhaps you will give in charity or do some good.'
1566.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa bibinya dari pihak ibu diceraikan dan ia ingin memanen kurma miliknya. Seorang laki-laki memberitahunya bahwa ia tidak boleh keluar. Ia datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan menyebutkan hal itu. Beliau bersabda: 'Keluarlah dan panen kurmamu, mungkin kamu akan bersedekah atau berbuat kebaikan.'

1567.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she wanted to buy Barirah, but her masters wanted to stipulate that her loyalty (wala') remain with them. Aisha mentioned that to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he said: 'Buy her, for the wala' belongs to the one who sets the slave free.' So she bought her and freed her.
1567.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ingin membeli Barirah, tetapi para tuannya ingin mensyaratkan agar perwalian (wala') tetap ada pada mereka. Aisha menyebutkan hal itu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau bersabda: 'Belilah ia, karena wala' adalah milik orang yang memerdekakan budak.' Maka ia pun membelinya dan memerdekakannya.

1568.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her and she had brought food to eat, but there was no meat in it. He said: 'Did I not see a cooking pot set up?' She said: 'O Messenger of Allah, that is meat given to Barirah as charity, and you do not eat charity.' He said: 'It is charity for her, but a gift for us from her.'
1568.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuinya dan ia telah menyiapkan makanan, tetapi tidak ada daging di dalamnya. Beliau bersabda: 'Bukankah aku melihat periuk yang dipasang?' Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, itu adalah daging yang diberikan kepada Barirah sebagai sedekah, dan engkau tidak makan sedekah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu sedekah baginya, tetapi hadiah bagi kami darinya.'

1569.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when Aisha freed Barirah, her husband was a slave. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ began urging her to stay with her husband, and she began saying to the Messenger of Allah: 'O Messenger of Allah, do you command me?' He said: 'I am only interceding.' She said: 'Then I have no need of him.'
1569.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Aisha memerdekakan Barirah, suaminya masih budak. Rasulullah ﷺ mulai mendorongnya untuk tetap bersama suaminya, dan Barirah berkata kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah engkau memerintahkan aku?' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku hanya memberikan syafaat (permohonan).' Ia berkata: 'Kalau begitu aku tidak membutuhkannya.'

1570.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the husband of Barirah was a slave named Mughith. As if I can see him walking behind her, crying, with his tears running down his beard. The Prophet ﷺ said to al-Abbas: 'O Abbas, are you not amazed at the love of Mughith for Barirah and the hatred of Barirah for Mughith?' The Prophet ﷺ said to Barirah: 'If you would return to him?' She said: 'O Messenger of Allah, do you command me?' He said: 'I am only interceding.' She said: 'I have no need of him.'
1570.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa suami Barirah adalah seorang budak bernama Mughith. Seolah-olah aku melihatnya berjalan di belakangnya sambil menangis, air matanya mengalir di janggutnya. Nabi ﷺ bersabda kepada al-Abbas: 'Wahai Abbas, tidakkah kamu heran dengan cinta Mughith kepada Barirah dan kebencian Barirah kepada Mughith?' Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada Barirah: 'Seandainya kamu kembali kepadanya?' Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah engkau memerintahkan aku?' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku hanya memberikan syafaat (permohonan).' Ia berkata: 'Aku tidak membutuhkannya.'

1571.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman came to him and said: 'My husband wants to take my child away.' Abu Hurairah said: 'I was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when a similar case was brought to him and he said: "O boy, this is your father and this is your mother. Take the hand of whichever of them you wish." The boy took his mother's hand and she went with him.'
1571.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang wanita datang kepadanya dan berkata: 'Suamiku ingin mengambil anakku.' Abu Hurairah berkata: 'Aku pernah bersama Rasulullah ﷺ ketika kasus serupa dibawa kepada beliau dan beliau bersabda: "Wahai anak, ini adalah ayahmu dan ini adalah ibumu. Pegang tangan siapa pun yang kamu mau." Anak itu mengambil tangan ibunya dan ibunya pergi bersamanya.'

1572.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'A slave woman receives two divorces and her waiting period is two menstrual cycles.'
1572.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang budak perempuan hanya menerima dua kali talak dan masa idahnya adalah dua kali haid.'

1573.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding the captives of Awtas: 'A pregnant woman shall not be touched until she gives birth, and a non-pregnant woman shall not be touched until she has had one menstrual cycle.'
1573.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda mengenai tawanan Awtas: 'Wanita yang hamil tidak boleh digauli sampai ia melahirkan, dan wanita yang tidak hamil tidak boleh digauli sampai ia menyelesaikan satu kali haid.'
